messages.subject: [OGRUG] Subject: R Users Group Meeting
messages.body_plain:
Subject: R Users Group Meeting (first announcement)

Ottawa Gatineau R Users Group (OGRUG) a.k.a. R-UG-Ottawa will meet 15:30-17:00 in room
4351 Herzberg Laboratories (see http://www1.carleton.ca/campus/) on November 30, 2011.

Agenda:

* Meet and greet -- Who are we? (10 mins)

* Jason Nielsen: Using C and Fortran with R. (50-60 mins)

* "Problems I'm having": If you have a particular issue or problem that can be shared and
solved, please send summary (preferably with R script)  John Nash (nashjc _at_ uottawa.ca)
(20 mins)
